name: Easy Shrimp Creole
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds frozen shrimp, thawed, shelled and cleaned, OR
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, melt the margarine.
2. Add onions and cook slightly.
3. Stir in buttermilk bisquit mix until well blended with the onions.
4. Combine remaining ingredients (except shrimp and rice) in a bowl.
5. Add the onion mixture to a crock pot; stir well.
6. Cover and cook on low setting for 7 to 9 hours.
7. One hour before serving, turn to high setting and add shrimp.
8. Remove bay leaf and serve over hot fluffy rice.
